, June 8
Daily
What did you work on today
4:50 PM
Investigated admin prod performance issues via CloudWatch and Sentry; traced slow transactions page to a 4.5-min SQL query doing JSONB lookups on stripe_event_data
Pushed church-scoping PR and index migration PR to address query bottleneck
Slacked w/ @Vincent about SQL and subsequent PR
Sync w/ @Brandon (et all) re: transactions report issues
Reviewed several PRs
Left comments on PRs and in Linear
Screenshot 2026-06-08 at 4.45.42 PM.png
Screenshot 2026-06-08 at 4.45.42 PM.png
Callouts: 
## Lead with
- **CI Performance Optimization** – Reduced Admin CI time from ~17.5 minutes to ~4.8 minutes by testing and tuning cluster-based sharding.
- **Production Admin Performance Fix** – Identified and resolved the slow transactions page bottleneck (4.5-min SQL query on JSONB lookups); shipped index migration and church-scoping PR to prod.
- **Recurring Gift & Webhook Issues** – Debugged and resolved duplicate recurring gift update emails caused by overlapping local Stripe webhook listeners; investigated first/15th subscription edge cases.
- **Code Review Quality Improvements** – Enhanced Apollo Code Review with Fable, improving merge velocity and code quality consistency.
- **Charge/Refund Schema Work** – Advanced mapper I/O design for the new project; synchronized team on direction and drafted follow-up PRs.
- **Security Audits Initiative** – Proposed and launched AI security analysis across Apollos platform with dedicated Linear project.
## Honorable mentions
- Shipped easier staging/deployment status lookup tool for faster operational visibility.
- Hotfixed new database index to prod for Admin Giving Transactions SQL improvements (feature flagged work ongoing).
## Top 3 if you only get three
1. CI performance optimization (17.5 → 4.8 minutes)
2. Production admin performance fix
3. Recurring gift & webhook listener bug fix
Lead with
CI Performance Optimization – Reduced Admin CI time from ~17.5 minutes to ~4.8 minutes by testing and tuning cluster-based sharding.
Production Admin Performance Fix – Identified and resolved the slow transactions page bottleneck (4.5-min SQL query on JSONB lookups); shipped index migration and church-scoping PR to prod.
Recurring Gift & Webhook Issues – Debugged and resolved duplicate recurring gift update emails caused by overlapping local Stripe webhook listeners; investigated first/15th subscription edge cases.
Code Review Quality Improvements – Enhanced Apollo Code Review with Fable, improving merge velocity and code quality consistency.
Charge/Refund Schema Work – Advanced mapper I/O design for the new project; synchronized team on direction and drafted follow-up PRs.
Security Audits Initiative – Proposed and launched AI security analysis across Apollos platform with dedicated Linear project.
